steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify package contents including hedge rack, locks, and bolts.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify package contents including hedge rack, locks, and bolts.

steps.title: Trailer rail Mount
steps.content: For open trailers, drill 3/8" holes directly over upright support posts and bolt rack on. Use support extensions if rail flexes.

es.title: Trailer rail Mount
es.content: For open trailers, drill 3/8" holes directly over upright support posts and bolt rack on. Use support extensions if rail flexes.

steps.title: Enclosed Mounting
steps.content: For enclosed trailers, mount rack at 45-degree angle for optimal support. Drill screws through wall into steel support frame.

es.title: Enclosed Mounting
es.content: For enclosed trailers, mount rack at 45-degree angle for optimal support. Drill screws through wall into steel support frame.

steps.title: Secure Trimmer
steps.content: Place hedge trimmer in locking bracket and padlock shut.

es.title: Secure Trimmer
es.content: Place hedge trimmer in locking bracket and padlock shut.
